applicant.organisation: R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd

official_sources.use: Official Innovate UK IFS page for UK-Switzerland CR&D Round 3: UK business must collaborate with at least one non-linked Swiss implementation partner applying through Innosuisse; fields are Semiconductors, Life Sciences, and Engineering Biology.
Official Innosuisse page: Swiss and UK participants submit to their own portals; partner search is supported by b2match/EEN; priority areas are Semiconductors, Life Sciences, and Engineering Biology.

Official Innosuisse bilateral-projects page: Swiss consortium generally needs at least one Swiss implementation partner plus a research institution, and at least one implementation partner from the partner country.

SwissChips research page: ETH, EPFL and CSEM work packages cover IC design infrastructure, semiconductors, sensors, system demonstrators, reports and open-source software; international collaboration is case-by-case.
Kandou AI official page: AI hardware connectivity, GPU/memory/network/rack connectivity, Copper MIMO, sales contact listed on site.
Sensirion contact page: Swiss headquarters in Stafa, Switzerland, with general contact email and phone.
Corintis official page: liquid cooling for high-power chips in data centers, relevant to semiconductor/AI infrastructure cooling.
Artemis Technologies official page: clean maritime technology company developing zero-emission commercial vessels and eFoiler technology.
Artemis 2026 update: Belfast manufacturing and clean maritime innovation, EF-24 passenger ferry pilot and Belfast Maritime Consortium context.
Belfast Harbour NI Green Seas page: consortium partners and decarbonisation focus including shore-side electricity, hydrogen vessels, battery storage and green port infrastructure.
Belfast Harbour ESG 2024: Project Harlander electric autonomous shuttle pilot and zero-emission digitally managed mobility.
Harland & Wolff commercial page: Belfast large drydocks/deep-water access and commercial vessel services; use with current-acquisition/admin caution.
Harland & Wolff contact page: notes Navantia UK acquisition and gives Navantia UK contact channel; verify eligibility before any outreach.

uk_swiss_pipeline.current_gate: Need named Swiss implementation partner, research institution or waiver, work-package split, budget/person-months, IP/data/export-control/TR&I and impact/award evidence before final completion or submission.

targets.public_contact_channel: sales@kandou.ai (listed on official Kandou AI site)
targets.aureon_work_package: Aureon evidence automation for reproducibility records, claim control, benchmark evidence, project reporting and cross-partner audit trails.

targets.public_contact_channel: info@sensirion.com (listed on official Sensirion contact page)
targets.aureon_work_package: Aureon evidence automation for sensor-R&D evidence traceability, validation reporting, data-handling controls and funder-ready work-package records.

targets.route_fit: Semiconductor/AI infrastructure cooling; high-power chip liquid cooling.
targets.public_contact_channel: Official website contact route; exact public email not confirmed in current readback.
targets.aureon_work_package: Aureon evidence automation for cooling validation records, test source mapping, risk tagging and partner/funder reporting.

targets.target_type: Research-institution network / ecosystem route, not a confirmed implementation partner
targets.route_fit: Semiconductors; IC design infrastructure, sensors, demonstrators and open-source/software deliverables.
targets.public_contact_channel: SwissChips Project Management Office via official SwissChips site.
targets.aureon_work_package: Aureon evidence automation for collaboration evidence, open-source/reproducibility records, claim control and project reporting.

draft_template.subject: UK-Switzerland CR&D Round 3 collaboration query - evidence automation work package
draft_template.body:
Dear [Partner team],

R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd is preparing an Innovate UK / Innosuisse UK-Switzerland CR&D Round 3 route for Aureon, a local-first evidence automation and AI workflow assurance platform.

Aureon can contribute a UK work package focused on source-grounded evidence records, reproducibility logs, claim control, validation reporting, and funder-ready audit trails for a qualifying project in semiconductors, life sciences, or engineering biology.

Before we can progress the IFS draft, we need to confirm whether your organisation could act as a Swiss implementation partner, and whether a Swiss or eligible research institution route is available.

Could you confirm: (1) whether the theme is a fit for your current R&D roadmap; (2) whether you can apply through Innosuisse as a Swiss implementation partner; (3) whether a research institution partner or waiver route is available; (4) the likely work-package split; (5) budget/person-month assumptions; and (6) any IP, data, export-control or Trusted Research issues we should account for?

Regards,
Gary Leckey
Director, R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd
Aureon Institute

maritime_pipeline.current_gate: Need named maritime lead partner, vessel/infrastructure asset, site, safety/permit basis, deployment/trial plan and partner budget before portal draft or submission.

targets.aureon_work_package: Aureon evidence automation for trial/deployment records, source evidence, safety/risk evidence, milestone reporting and funder-ready audit trails.

targets.route_fit: ZEVI/CMDC partner-led routes needing port/site/infrastructure/decarbonisation context; Green Seas consortium and Green Port ambitions.
targets.public_contact_channel: Official Belfast Harbour contact route; exact grant recipient not selected.
targets.aureon_work_package: Aureon evidence automation for port decarbonisation evidence, mobility pilot evidence, infrastructure records and compliance reporting.

targets.public_contact_channel: navantiauk@navantia.es and official contact routes listed on Harland & Wolff contact page; use with acquisition/admin caution.
targets.aureon_work_package: Aureon evidence automation for shipyard work-package evidence, conversion records, quality/safety evidence and funder reporting.
required_evidence_to_unlock: Current eligible legal entity and lead role

draft_template.subject: Clean maritime grant collaboration query - Aureon evidence automation work package
draft_template.body:
Dear [Partner team],

R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd is preparing partner-led clean maritime grant routes where Aureon could contribute an evidence automation and assurance work package.

Aureon can support source inventories, deployment/trial evidence records, risk and claim control, milestone reporting, and funder-ready audit trails. We are not claiming vessel, port, shipyard, safety, permit, or budget evidence ourselves; the route can only proceed with a named maritime lead and project asset.

Could you confirm whether your organisation has a suitable vessel, infrastructure asset, port/shipyard site, deployment or trial plan, safety/permit basis, budget and eligible-cost position for a ZEVI or CMDC-style collaboration where Aureon acts as evidence/reporting work-package provider?

Regards,
Gary Leckey
Director, R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd
Aureon Institute

next_actions: Use the UK-Switzerland template only after choosing an exact partner recipient and approving the exact payload at action time.
Use the maritime template only after choosing an exact maritime recipient and approving the exact payload at action time.
If any partner replies, record the reply as evidence before changing any route to submit-ready.
Do not finish UK-Switzerland Project Impact, costs, award terms or final submit until partner budget and work-package evidence is recorded.
